name: cross-rewards
description: CROSS Chain (id 612055) single-pool, multi-reward staker driver via EOA + viem. Stake WCROSS into the rewards contract at 0xd9767038edb5c7ff1735d5a567696947d4907300, claim accrued reward tokens (e.g. CWT), and read pool/user state — all via natural language. Triggers on phrases like '스테이킹', '보상 수령', 'rewards 풀 보여줘', 'WCROSS deposit', 'harvest cross rewards', 'withdraw from cross staker'.
